source: product-inside.webp — Settings Chart on inside of welder door — extracted via visual inspection

navigation.step_2: Turn Main Knob until desired process appears on screen
navigation.step_3: Press Main Knob to select desired process
navigation.step_4: Follow Settings below for selected process
navigation.note: Press Main Knob to go to next screen. Press Back button to return to previous screen.

controls.left_knob: Left Knob — adjusts left-side parameter (wire diameter, rod diameter, electrode diameter, amperage)
controls.main_control_knob: Main Control Knob (center) — scrolls through menus, press to select
controls.right_knob: Right Knob — adjusts right-side parameter (material thickness, voltage, ON/OFF)

step_1_polarity_gas.description: Plug cables in according to screen. Connect gas according to screen. Set SCFH between 20-30.
step_1_polarity_gas.lcd_shows: Polarity diagram and gas type (e.g., Stainless Tri-Mix)

step_2_wire_material.description: Turn Left Knob to set wire diameter. Turn Right Knob to set material thickness.

step_3_auto_weld.description: Turn Left Knob to adjust Wire Feed Speed (Amperage). Turn Right Knob to adjust Voltage.
step_3_auto_weld.lcd_shows: WFS in/min (e.g., 121), Voltage (e.g., 13.8V), Process, Gas Type, Wire Diameter, Material Thickness, Run-In WFS, Inductance, Spot Timer
step_3_auto_weld.note: If WFS or Voltage are manually adjusted, white mark shows recommended setting

step_1_polarity_gas.description: Plug cables in according to screen. Connect gas according to screen. Set SCFH between 10-25.

step_2_rod_material.description: Turn Left Knob to set rod diameter. Turn Right Knob to set material thickness.

step_3_auto_weld.description: Turn Left Knob to adjust output amperage. Turn Right Knob to ON to energize TIG Torch.
step_3_auto_weld.lcd_shows: Amperage (e.g., 30A), ON/OFF status, Process (TIG with Pedal), Gas Type (100% Ar), Rod Diameter, Material Thickness
step_3_auto_weld.warning: Welder is now energized and Open Circuit Voltage is present

step_1_polarity.description: Plug cables in according to screen. No Gas Required.

step_2_electrode.description: Turn Main Control Knob to set electrode type.

step_3_diameter_material.description: Turn Left Knob to set electrode diameter. Turn Right Knob to set material thickness.

step_4_auto_weld.description: Turn Left Knob to adjust output amperage. Turn Right Knob to ON to energize Electrode Holder.
step_4_auto_weld.lcd_shows: Amperage (e.g., 60A), ON/OFF status, Process (Stick), Electrode Type (70XX), Electrode Diameter (3/32"), Material Thickness (16Ga), Hot Start, Arc Force
step_4_auto_weld.warning: Welder is now energized and Open Circuit Voltage is present

2_lb_spool: Place Spool over Spindle against Brake Pad
Replace Spacer and secure with Wingnut
10_12_lb_spool: Place Wire Spool over Adapter (line up pin)

wire_feed_setup: Release wire tensioner by turning Feed Tensioner knob counterclockwise
Ensure wire diameter matches roller size — Solid: V-groove, Flux-cored: knurled groove
While holding wire securely, cut the end of wire, ensuring flat and no burrs
Feed at least 12" of wire into Wire Inlet Liner
Lock Wire Arm down, swing Feed Tensioner to latch
Wire feeds for 3 seconds when Cold Wire Feed switch is pressed
